title: Job Auto Apply Input
description: Defines input parameters for automated job application runs.

token.title: User Token
token.description: Bearer token used to authenticate API requests to your FastAPI backend.

run_id.title: Automation Run ID
run_id.description: Unique ID for this automation session, created by the FastAPI backend.

cv_json.title: CV JSON
cv_json.description: Parsed CV data (title, skills, contact info) used for scoring.

cv_file_url.title: CV File URL
cv_file_url.description: Public link to user's CV file, used for file upload if needed.

jobs.title: Jobs List
jobs.description: List of jobs fetched from Adzuna/Jooble/GulfTalent with title, company, and URL.

min_match_score.title: Minimum Match Score
min_match_score.description: Jobs below this match score will be skipped.

max_jobs.title: Maximum Jobs
max_jobs.description: Maximum number of jobs to apply in this automation run.
